facade_axis_note: East facade: local x = world y (increasing northward, i.e. local x=0 is the south end of the building); local y = world z (increasing upward, ground = 0)

scale_origin.note: local origin = SE corner at ground level; local x runs northward = world y; local y = world z

strokes.note: East facade F1 wall body (ground floor, y=0 to 3.0m)
East facade F2 wall body (upper floor, y=3.0 to 6.6m)
F1 east window (corridor zone); 1200mm wide, 1800mm tall, sill at 1000mm; from top chain 3400+1200 and left F1 height chain 1000+1800+200
F2 east window (corridor zone); 1200mm wide, 1800mm tall, sill at 1000mm above F2 floor (y=3.0+1.0=4.0); from F2 height chain 1000+1800+800

dimensions.note: left sub-chain F2, parapet above window
left sub-chain F2, sill height above F2 floor
left sub-chain F1, spandrel above window

unknowns_noted: local x = world y; local x=0 is south end (world y=0), local x=8.0 is north end (world y=8.0)
F1 east window y=[1.0,2.8] from left chain: 1000mm sill + 1800mm height + 200mm spandrel = 3000 ✓; taller than south large windows
F2 east window y=[4.0,5.8] from left F2 chain: F2 floor y=3.0, sill=1.0m, height=1800mm ✓
window x position [3.40,4.60] (local) corresponds to corridor zone world y≈[3.40,4.60]; consistent with plan east corridor window
uncaptured_visual_elements: floor/storey line at y=3.0 visible as horizontal line; used to split wall_fill, not separately traced
building outline coincides with wall_fill edges; not drawn as separate outline stroke
excluded dimension annotation ticks and extension lines
